message:
✨ Add Developer Setup dialog in user profile Developer section (#1611)

New "Developer Setup" link alongside existing "Setup Instructions" in
the Developer section of the profile dropdown. Opens a dedicated modal
with dev-focused instructions: clone repo, configure GitHub OAuth (.env),
start with startup-oauth.sh, and info about the developer update channel.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,231 @@ +'use client' + +import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react' +import { Code2, Copy, Check, GitBranch, RefreshCw, ExternalLink, ChevronDown, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react' +import { BaseModal } from '../../lib/modals' +import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next' +import { UI_FEEDBACK_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../../lib/constants/network' + +interface DeveloperSetupDialogProps { + isOpen: boolean + onClose: () => void +} + +const REPO_URL = 'https://github.com/kubestellar/console' + +const DEV_CLONE_CMD = `git clone ${REPO_URL}.git && cd console` +const DEV_START_OAUTH_CMD = 'bash startup-oauth.sh' + +const ENV_TEMPLATE = `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID= +GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=` + +/** Unique keys for clipboard copy feedback per code block */ +const COPY_KEY_CLONE = 1 +const COPY_KEY_ENV = 2 +const COPY_KEY_START = 3 + +export function DeveloperSetupDialog({ isOpen, onClose }: DeveloperSetupDialogProps) { + const { t } = useTranslation() + const [copiedStep, setCopiedStep] = useState(null) + const [showUpdateChannel, setShowUpdateChannel] = useState(false) + const copiedTimerRef = useRef>() + + useEffect(() => { + return () => clearTimeout(copiedTimerRef.current) + }, []) + + const copyToClipboard = async (text: string, stepKey: number) => { + await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text) + setCopiedStep(stepKey) + clearTimeout(copiedTimerRef.current) + copiedTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopiedStep(null), UI_FEEDBACK_TIMEOUT_MS) + } + + return ( + + + + +
+ {/* Prerequisites */} +
+

{t('developerSetup.prerequisites')}

+
+
+ + Go 1.24+ +
+
+ + Node.js 20+ +
+
+ + Git +
+
+ + kubeconfig (optional) +
+
+
+ + {/* Step 1: Clone */} +
+
+ + {t('developerSetup.cloneRepo')} +
+
+ + {DEV_CLONE_CMD} + + copyToClipboard(DEV_CLONE_CMD, COPY_KEY_CLONE)} /> +
+
+ + {/* Step 2: Configure GitHub OAuth */} +
+
+ + {t('developerSetup.configureOAuth')} +
+
+
    +
  1. + {t('developerSetup.oauthStep1')}{' '} + + GitHub Developer Settings + +
    2. +
  2. {t('developerSetup.oauthStep2')}
    3. +
+
+
+ Homepage URL: + http://localhost:8080 +
+
+ Callback URL: + http://localhost:8080/auth/github/callback +
+
+

{t('developerSetup.oauthStep3')}

+

{t('developerSetup.envFile')}

+
+ 
+                  {ENV_TEMPLATE}
+
+ copyToClipboard(ENV_TEMPLATE, COPY_KEY_ENV)} /> +
+
+
+ + {/* Step 3: Start with OAuth */} +
+
+ + {t('developerSetup.startDev')} +
+
+ + {DEV_START_OAUTH_CMD} + + copyToClipboard(DEV_START_OAUTH_CMD, COPY_KEY_START)} /> +
+

+ {t('developerSetup.startDevDesc')} +

+
+ + {/* What you get */} +
+
+
Frontend {'\u2192'} http://localhost:5174 (Vite HMR)
+
Backend {' \u2192'} http://localhost:8080
+
kc-agent {'\u2192'} http://localhost:8585
+
+
+ + {/* Developer update channel (collapsible) */} +
+ + {showUpdateChannel && ( +
+

+ {t('developerSetup.updateChannelDesc')} +

+
+ + Settings + {'\u2192'} + Updates + {'\u2192'} + Developer +
+

+ {t('developerSetup.updateChannelNote')} +

+
+ )} +
+
+ + + +
+ + + GitHub + +
+
+ + + + ) +} + +function StepBadge({ step }: { step: number }) { + return ( + + {step} + + ) +} + +function CopyButton({ copied, onClick }: { copied: boolean; onClick: () => void }) { + const { t } = useTranslation() + return ( + + ) +}

   },

     "select": "Select Language"
